utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with matching keys. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists specific physical plans per family member, a mental health plan, add-ons, and a total monthly cost. Costs are provided; thus fully specified. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists a home contents policy, an add-on, and a cost; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists a plan, support services, and a total cost; fully specified. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists items with costs; fully specified. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides a monthly total but no annual breakdown; since the format says complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual component is missing. Therefore, total_budget is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item named in the final coverage plan to the identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. For health: EliteCare Premium Plan (Raj) maps to physical_health EliteCare (rating 10); LifeFirst Standard Plan (Anita) maps to physical_health LifeFirst (rating 8); InsurePlus Standard Plan (Aryan & Priya) maps to physical_health InsurePlus (rating 6); mental_health 'WellMind Family Plan' has no corresponding ground-truth entry, so it cannot be rated. Health add-ons: Executive Health Package is not in the ground-truth list; Specialist Access appears under health_enhancement_services with rating 10. Property: EliteHome Premium Coverage maps to property_protection home_content EliteHome (rating 10); Smart Home Integration appears under property_enhancement_services (rating 8). Travel: EliteTravel Premium Plan maps to mobility_coverage travel_insurance EliteTravel (rating 10); support services 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 9), Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 8), Business Travel Support (rating 10). Additional services repeat some items already mapped; only include those that exist in ground-truth. Items without ground-truth counterparts are excluded from RATINGS.
